title: Attachment dropzone component with drag, drop, and paste support
purpose: Provides a UI component that accepts file uploads via drag-and-drop, file selection, or clipboard paste, and handles the upload process to a backend API.
module_context: Exports a React component named AttachmentDropzone that manages drag state and file upload operations. Includes interfaces for attachment data and component props.

steps.content: Initialize the drag-over state to false.
Define and memoize the file upload function that sends files to the backend API.
Define and memoize the clipboard paste handler that processes pasted files.
Define and memoize the drag-over handler that updates the drag state.
Define and memoize the drag-leave handler that updates the drag state.
Determine the CSS class name based on the drag-over state.
Render the dropzone container with event handlers and child content.
Create a form data object and append the file to it.
Send a POST request to the backend API with the file data.
IF the response is not successful, exit the function.
Parse the JSON response from the API.
Call the upload callback with the parsed attachment data.
Extract the clipboard data items from the event.
IF clipboard data is not available, exit the handler.
Filter the clipboard items to extract file objects.
IF no files are found in the clipboard, exit the handler.
Prevent the default paste behavior.
Upload each extracted file using the upload function.
Prevent the default drop behavior.
Reset the drag-over state to false.
Extract the dropped files from the event data transfer.
IF no files are present, exit the handler.
Upload each dropped file using the upload function.
Prevent the default drag-over behavior.
Set the drag-over state to true.
Prevent the default drag-leave behavior.
Set the drag-over state to false.
